rationale: Section 1-m addresses water conservation initiative tax relief, not residence homestead exemptions. It imposes no limitation on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). The relevant constitutional authority is art. VIII, §1-b.
quote: The legislature by general law may authorize a taxing unit to grant an exemption or other relief from ad valorem taxes on property on which a water conservation initiative has been implemented.
_note: No conflict; §1-m is topically unrelated to homestead exemptions. The governing constitutional provision for §11.13(b) is art. VIII, §1-b, not §1-m.
